arts.ttl: Football fans are calling for Arsenal player to be retrospectively banned after incident in FA Cup clash with Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United rolled back the years in terms of feistiness as they battled it out on FA Cup action at The Emirates. United...

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire's three-word message to Kai Havertz during Arsenal vs Man United chaos
arts.sum: Arsenal vs Man United descended into chaos with Harry Maguire's angry reaction to the key penalty decision picked up by BBC cameras

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz misses a golden opportunity from close range to fire Arsenal into the lead in their FA Cup clash with Man United
arts.sum: Kai Havertz skied an attempt from close range in Arsenal's FA Cup third round clash with Manchester United on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Why Gabriel Martinelli's FA Cup goal vs Man United was still given as offside despite touch from Harry Maguire
Should Arsenal Amplify Its Anti-Knife Crime Kit Message?
arts.sum: Arsenal’s No More Red campaign has been a commendable step in addressing youth violence and knife crime in London.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim explains surprise Alejandro Garnacho inclusion as Marcus Rashford dropped for Man Utd FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim revealed that Alejandro Garnacho's surprise inclusion in Manchester United's starting XI for their FA Cup clash with Arsenal was a result of his impressive performances in training despite a flurry of transfer speculation surrounding the player. "Amad [Diallo] had a small issue during the week and I like the way Garnacho plays - he is playing well," Amorim told the BBC pre-game.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire's three-word message to Kai Havertz before brawl spotted
arts.sum: Harry Maguire called out Kai Havertz after the Arsenal star went down under a challenge from the Manchester United defender - which landed his side a penalty in their FA Cup tie

arts.ttl: Tempers flare after Arsenal awarded controversial penalty
arts.sum: Watch as Manchester United and Arsenal players need to be physically restrained after disputing the award of a penalty for a foul on Kai Havertz.

arts.ttl: Arsenal's Gabriel equalises against Man Utd in dramatic second half
arts.sum: Gabriel equalises for Arsenal against ten-man Manchester United in the FA Cup at Emirates Stadium.

arts.ttl: Arsenal surely have to step up transfer efforts as star stretchered off vs Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal striker Gabriel Jesus was stretchered off during the first half of Sunday’s FA Cup clash against Manchester United. The Brazilian picked up the injury while attempting to challenge Bruno Fernandes, just as the United captain was lining up a shot.
